nasb.text: When he falls, he will not be hurled headlong, Because the Lord is the One who holds his hand.

esv.text: though he fall, he shall not be cast headlong, for the Lord  upholds his hand.

cnv.text: 他雖然跌跤，卻不至仆倒； 因為耶和華用手扶持他。

ccb.text: 他们即使失脚，也不会跌倒， 因为耶和华的手扶持他们。

csbs.text: 他即使仆倒，也不被抛弃， 因为耶和华扶助他的手。
